expectations.text: Hero contains an animated visual specific to focus/blocking (tabs being X'd out, timer animation)
expectations.evidence: Hero uses static 🎯 emoji only — no tab animations, no timer visual, no blocking animation

expectations.text: Page uses dark background (#0d0d0d or similar)
Uses cyan or blue accent color appropriate for tech/SaaS
expectations.evidence: #0891b2 cyan-blue used for buttons and accents

expectations.text: Hero headline is 10 words or fewer

expectations.evidence: No banned phrases, though headline is generic ('Stay Focused. Get More Done.' could be any productivity app)

expectations.text: Stats section with at least 3 social proof numbers
Feature grid with at least 4 cards
Final CTA with email input and button
expectations.evidence: Email input and Start Free Trial button present

expectations.text: A countdown/focus timer is present and animated or functional
expectations.evidence: No timer visual anywhere on the page
